hub.subtitle: Quick brain-training games that feed your dashboard streak.

sequencePuzzle.title: Sequence Puzzle
sequencePuzzle.prompt: What comes next in the sequence?

mentalRotation.title: Mental Rotation Challenge
mentalRotation.prompt: Which option is a true rotation of this shape, not a mirror image?

selectiveAttention.title: Selective Attention Challenge
selectiveAttention.prompt: Click the one arrow pointing a different direction.
